summary: Found two medium reliability risks in the new uncaught-exception handling. The focused tests added by the commit pass, but the new recovery path is broader than the Telegram failure it is meant to address and is not scoped to the affected Telegram account.

actions.reason: ClawSweeper found an actionable commit-level bug/regression candidate.
